project_type: Next.js app with Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL
verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles without errors. The seed-catalog.ts imports from meta-parts.ts and must compile cleanly.
environment_constraints: No database available for running actual seed. Validation is TypeScript compilation only. Beyblade Wiki Fandom API accessible at beyblade.fandom.com/api.php.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS and semantic HTML for UI (not relevant here). Data changes must work with existing seed-catalog.ts upsert logic.
key_patterns: meta-parts.ts exports MetaPartSeed type, metaParts (hand-curated), wikiGeneratedParts (auto-generated from name arrays), cxGeneratedParts (CX line from name arrays), and allMetaParts (combined, deduplicated). The applyMetaPartMetadata function infers series from blade name membership in Sets. The seed-catalog.ts uses slug as unique key for upserts.
directory_structure: prisma/data/meta-parts.ts is the main file to update. prisma/seed-catalog.ts consumes it. prisma/schema.prisma defines enums and PartCatalog model.
